body.title: Fix 4 broken test files with stale module imports post-migration
body.result: fixed/deleted 4 broken test files — 0 collection errors: updated 7 stale igor.* imports in book_learner.py to devices.igor.*, deleted test_swadl_flows_gmail.py + test_swadl_pages_gmail.py (swadl_flows/pages modules never migrated) + test_uc_watchdog.py (uc_watchdog removed, no successor)
body.description:
4 test files fail at collection due to stale import paths from the wild_igor → devices/igor migration. All tests are currently blocked by these errors.

1. tests/test_reading_lever_detection.py — lab/claudecode/book_learner.py imports 'from igor.cognition import milieu' (old path). Fix to 'from devices.igor.cognition import milieu' or find current module path.
2. tests/test_swadl_flows_gmail.py — imports 'devices.igor.tools.swadl_flows' which does not exist. Check if module was moved; if genuinely gone, delete the test file.
3. tests/test_swadl_pages_gmail.py — imports 'devices.igor.tools.swadl_pages' which does not exist. Same — check or delete.
4. tests/test_uc_watchdog.py — imports 'devices.igor.cognition.uc_watchdog' which does not exist. The watchdog was renamed/replaced; update import or delete test.

For each: grep for the module in UU to find its new home; update import if found; delete test file if module is genuinely gone (note deletion in commit message).

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/book_learner.py, tests/test_reading_lever_detection.py, tests/test_swadl_flows_gmail.py, tests/test_swadl_pages_gmail.py, tests/test_uc_watchdog.py
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix or delete the 4 broken test files; OUT — do not refactor tests or add new coverage
**Test plan:** cd ~/TheIgors && python -m pytest tests/ -q returns 0 collection errors; all previously-passing tests still pass
